name: marp_slides
description: Generate a professional presentation in Marp Markdown format. Returns ready-to-use Marp slides that can be converted to PDF/PPTX/HTML using 'marp --pptx slides.md'. Use this when the user asks to create a PPT, presentation, slide deck, or keynote.

content.description: Slide body content in Markdown (bullet points, text, code blocks, etc.)
